LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT KELLER, FISHBACK & JACKSON LLP'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS - MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE IS DENIED (CCP 395(A), 395.5.). VENUE IS PROPER IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY PER CCP 395(A) AND 395.5, IN LIGHT OF THE FACT THAT THE WRITTEN CONTRACT WAS IN FACT ENTERED INTO IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY. ON SEPTEMBER 8, 2010, DEFENDANT KELLER, FISHBACK & JACKSON, LLP SIGNED THE MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT. (COMPLAINT, EXHIBIT B, P. 4.) ON SEPTEMBER 20, 2010, IXC HOLDINGS, INC. DBA TELEKENEX SIGNED IT. THUS, THE MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT WAS ENTERED INTO IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, AND VENUE IS PROPER HERE. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS LIKEWISE DENIED. MS. AARONSON TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976 (302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-19-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CASSIANA AARONSON, TEL. NO. (510) 844-5590 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT KELLER, FISHBACK & JACKSON LLP's Motion To Transfer Action And Request For Sanctions - Motion to Transfer venue is Denied (CCP 395(a), 395.5.). Venue is proper in San Francisco County per CCP 395(a) and 395.5, in light of the fact that the written contract was in fact entered into in San Francisco County. On September 8, 2010, Defendant Keller, Fishback & Jackson, LLP signed the Master Services Agreement. (Complaint, Exhibit B, p. 4.) On September 20, 2010, IXC Holdings, Inc. dba Telekenex signed it. Thus, the Master Services Agreement was entered into in San Francisco County, and venue is proper here. The Request for sanctions is likewise denied. Ms. Aaronson to prepare form of order. Judge: John K. Stewart, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/jks

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-15-2014 Continued To Jun-19-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification. DEFENDANT KELLER, FISHBACK & JACKSON LLP's Motion To Transfer Action And Request For Sanctions is continued to June 19, 2014 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 15, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.
